up.method: grew at 21% O2 in gas phase; obligate aerobe, no anoxic growth even with nitrate/fumarate/DMSO; no O2 uptake rate measured

growth_records.cite: Pessi G et al. Response of Burkholderia cenocepacia H111 to Micro-Oxia. PLoS ONE (2013). DOI:10.1371/journal.pone.0072939. [PMC3759415]
growth_records.snippet: aerobic conditions (21% O2), the cells grew ... generation time of approximately 65 minutes. When only 5% or 0.5% oxygen was supplied ... generation times of 113 and 180 minutes ... 0.1% oxygen with a doubling time of 268 minutes.
growth_records.notes: Generation (doubling) time 65 min = 1.083 h reported directly at 21% O2. mu = ln2/td = 0.6931/1.083 = 0.64 h-1 (calculated). Grown in complex LB (composition not stated). Biolog PM plates used qualitatively for C/N-source utilisation (no rates). No substrate uptake or product secretion rates measured. Strictly aerobe: no growth anoxically with nitrate, fumarate, DMSO, pyruvate, oxalate or arginine. [metadata completed from paper Methods: temperature]

up.method: grew at 5% O2 in gas phase; obligate aerobe, no anoxic growth even with nitrate/fumarate/DMSO; no O2 uptake rate measured

growth_records.notes: Generation (doubling) time 113 min = 1.883 h reported directly at 5% O2. mu = ln2/td = 0.6931/1.883 = 0.368 h-1 (calculated). Grown in complex LB (composition not stated). Biolog PM plates used qualitatively for C/N-source utilisation (no rates). No substrate uptake or product secretion rates measured. growth_records.snippet: aerobic conditions (21% O2), the cells grew ... generation time of approximately 65 minutes. When only 5% or 0.5% oxygen was supplied ... generation times of 113 and 180 minutes ... 0.1% oxygen with a doubling time of 268 minutes.
growth_records.notes: Generation (doubling) time 268 min = 4.467 h reported directly at 0.1% O2. mu = ln2/td = 0.6931/4.467 = 0.155 h-1 (calculated). Grown in complex LB (composition not stated).
